ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ, London Stock Exchange) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., stock, commodity, forex) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market (e.g., New York, London, Tokyo) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the market */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the market */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the market (e.g., open, closed, holiday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG, EURUSD) */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the symbol is traded */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of symbol (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the symbol is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the symbol belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the symbol belongs */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the symbol */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the symbol's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbols_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the trade */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the trade */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the trade */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the trade */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price (considering splits and dividends) */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade data (e.g., stock exchange, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol paying the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for the dividend */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the dividend is paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol undergoing the split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  "ex_split_date" TEXT /* Ex-split date */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the split is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being rated */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst providing the rating */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm or institution providing the rating */,
  "rating_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being watched */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the symbol was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the symbol in the watchlist */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Date and time when the symbol was last viewed in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., historical data, real-time data) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the request */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_requests_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being responded to */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "data" TEXT /* Market data being returned (in a binary format) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data being returned (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data being returned */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., success, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_responses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES market_data_requests ("request_id")
)
